title: Notifications -  Update successful OFF
scenario: Verify that no notification pops up after a successful DFU update when device software update notifications are disabled in App Settings.
steps: 2. Navigate to the device software update notification setting.
3. Turn OFF the device software update notification.
4. Initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete successfully.
expected: No notification should pop up upon successful update.
